bias.description: worker fully verifies the exact package hash, schema hash, and manifest segment order before its inner DuckDB timer; verification remains included in process CPU/RSS but is excluded from reported inner wall
independent stock-public-C-API CTAS excludes destination mirrors, receipt, checkpoint, and destination commit orchestration after package verification
DuckDB has 16 internal threads while the canonical IPC scanner is fixed at the product-admitted width of 2
logical bytes are the exact 115421208360-byte materialized Arrow-vector authority shared with the product cell; physical bytes are the verified 1291273686 manifest-ordered source IPC bytes
the macro spill field is unavailable for this worker and serializes zero; DuckDB native peak_temp_directory_size is authoritative for temporary spill
measured worker runs inside a transient user systemd MemoryMax=16G cgroup

reference.name: stock_libduckdb_public_c_api_table_function
reference.semantic_work: CTAS from the same fully verified finalized canonical LZ4 IPC package with identical row-key derivation; excludes CDF destination mirrors, receipt, and checkpoint work
